name: Heartland Alliance
description: Agricultural society that supplies the majority of the world's grain

weaknesses.name: Economic Pressures
weaknesses.description: Constantly pressured by more aggressive factions seeking to control their resources

doctrine.name: Doctrine of Vigilance
doctrine.description: Asymmetrical defense focusing on environmental awareness and denial-of-surprise tactics

primary_tactics.name: Snare Lines
primary_tactics.description: Tripwire alarm system providing auditory alerts to approaching danger

composition.name: Wolverines
composition.description: Elite warriors serving as city and palace guard

government.name: Council of Diverse Peoples
government.description: Consensus-based system with a representative from each constituent species

vulnerabilities.name: Tie-Breaker System
vulnerabilities.description: Double vote system that can lead to stalemates and manipulation

culture.name: Culture Forged by Wind and Speed
culture.description: Society that prizes speed, hyper-aware communication, and a deep connection to the environment

core_traits.name: Rapid Information Spread
core_traits.description: Functions as an informal intelligence network
